nasb.text: The teaching of the wise is a fountain of life, To turn aside from the snares of death.

esv.text: The teaching of the wise is a fountain of life, that one may turn away from the snares of death.

cnv.text: 智慧人的訓誨是生命的泉源， 能使人避開死亡的網羅。

ccb.text: 智者的训言是生命之泉， 可使人避开死亡的网罗。

csbs.text: 智慧人的法则是生命的泉源， 使人远离死亡的陷阱。
